sections.paragraph:
μηδαμῶς (Aeschyl., Hdt. et al.; pap [Mayser 182; also POxy 901, 11; PStras 40, 34]; LXX; JosAs; Jos., Ant. 18, 20; 70); also μηθαμῶς (UPZ 79, 8 [159 b.c.]) 1 Cl 33:1; 45:7; 53:4 (s. B-D-F §33; W-S. §5, 27f; Reinhold §6, 3). By no means, certainly not, no adv., stating a negative reaction (Chion, Ep. 16, 7; Lucian, Dial. Deor. 4, 2; Ael. Aristid. 23, 79 K.=42 p. 794 D.) Ac 10:14; 11:8; Hv 1, 2, 4; also the pass. fr. 1 Cl cited above.—M-M.

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Mayser Mayser = EM., Grammatik der griechischen Papyri aus der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

PStras PStras = Griechische Papyrus der kaiserlichen Universitäts- und Landesbibliothek zu Strassburg—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

UPZ UPZ = Urkunden der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

W-S. W-S. = GWiner, Grammatik des neutestamentlichen Sprachidioms, ed. PSchmiedel—List 6

Reinhold Reinhold = HR., De graecitate patrum apostolicorum librorum apocryphorum novi testamenti etc.—List 6

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Chion Chion , IV b.c.; for letters attributed to him, I a.d., s. Ep.—List 5

Ep.

Ep. = Epistola/Epistula, when applied to letters mostly pseudonymous; various dates—List 5

  1. = epistle

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Ael. Aristid. Ael. Aristid. = Aelius Aristides, II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Hv Hv = Visions

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

  1. fr. = from

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 642
